description: Real-time Seoul population visualization with tycoon game aesthetics

data_source.api: Seoul Open Data Integrated Real-time API (OA-21285)

sub_tasks.title: Project scaffolding
sub_tasks.description: Initialize Vite + React + TypeScript project. Install PixiJS, Tailwind CSS. Set up folder structure: src/{components,services,assets,types,hooks}. Configure environment variable for API key (VITE_SEOUL_API_KEY). Add .env.example.
sub_tasks.acceptance: Project builds successfully, dev server starts, folder structure in place

sub_tasks.title: Seoul SVG map component
sub_tasks.description: Create SeoulMap component with simplified SVG of Seoul's 25 districts. Include Han River path, major roads, district boundaries. Implement pan and zoom (CSS transform with touch/mouse events). Map fills viewport. Pastel green color scheme.
sub_tasks.acceptance: SVG map renders full viewport, pan/zoom works on mobile and desktop, districts visible with Han River

sub_tasks.title: Location registry (122 hotspot coordinate mapping)
sub_tasks.description: Create LocationRegistry data file mapping all 122 Seoul hotspot names/codes to SVG coordinates (x,y). Source the official 122 location list from Seoul Open Data (서울시 주요 122장소 목록.xlsx). Map each location to approximate position on the SVG map based on real geographic coordinates. Export as typed constant array. This is a data-entry intensive task.
sub_tasks.acceptance: All 122 locations have valid SVG coordinates, exported as typed constant, importable by other components

sub_tasks.title: Hotspot marker component
sub_tasks.description: Create HotspotMarker component with floating label + pulsing dot. Render all 122 markers on the map using LocationRegistry data. Dot color changes by congestion level prop (green/orange/red). Click handler for selection.
sub_tasks.acceptance: 122 markers rendered at correct positions, dots pulse, colors change by congestion level, click selects marker

sub_tasks.title: Seoul API service and data store
sub_tasks.description: Create SeoulApiService to fetch data from Seoul Integrated API. Implement batched fetching with concurrency limit (5 parallel, adjust based on rate limit testing). Create DataStore with in-memory cache (Map<string, AreaData>). Auto-refresh every 5 minutes. Parse population (LIVE_PPLTN_STTS), weather (WEATHER_STTS), air quality (AIR_STTS) from response. Type definitions for all API response shapes. API key from import.meta.env.VITE_SEOUL_API_KEY.
sub_tasks.acceptance: Service fetches data for sample area, parses correctly, cache stores/retrieves, auto-refresh timer works

sub_tasks.title: PixiJS character system
sub_tasks.description: Create PixiJS canvas overlay on top of SVG map. Implement Character class with kawaii sprite (round head, colored body, animated legs). Implement CharacterManager that spawns/despawns characters per hotspot based on congestion level (여유:2-5, 보통:5-10, 약간붐빔:10-20, 붐빔:20-40). Characters walk randomly within hotspot radius. Bouncy walk animation. Object pool for performance. Fade in/out on spawn/despawn.
sub_tasks.acceptance: Characters render on canvas, walk with animation, count matches congestion level, smooth spawn/despawn

sub_tasks.title: Weather animation overlay
sub_tasks.description: Create WeatherOverlay component with CSS animations. Implement: sun with pulse glow, drifting clouds, rain particles, snow particles, fine dust haze overlay. Sky gradient changes by weather state. Drive animations from real-time weather data (sky status from API). Smooth transitions between weather states.
sub_tasks.acceptance: All 4 weather states animate correctly, sky gradient changes, transitions are smooth

sub_tasks.title: Top bar UI (weather + air quality badges)
sub_tasks.description: Create TopBar component with weather badge (icon + temperature + description) and air quality badge (PM2.5 value + color-coded level). Badges are semi-transparent with backdrop blur. Air quality badge changes color: green(good), yellow(moderate), orange(unhealthy), red(very unhealthy). Update from real-time data.
sub_tasks.acceptance: Badges display correct data, air quality color changes by level, responsive on mobile

sub_tasks.title: Bottom sheet detail panel
sub_tasks.description: Create BottomSheet component that slides up when hotspot is selected. Shows: area name, congestion level (with color), estimated population range, gender ratio bar, age group distribution bar chart. Tap map background to dismiss. Smooth slide animation.
sub_tasks.acceptance: Bottom sheet slides up/down smoothly, displays all data fields, dismisses on background tap

sub_tasks.title: Data integration and state management
sub_tasks.description: Connect all components with real data flow. App loads → fetch all 122 areas → populate markers, characters, weather, air quality. Auto-refresh updates all components. Loading screen on initial fetch. Error handling: show cached data on failure, offline banner. 'Last updated' indicator.
sub_tasks.acceptance: Full data flow works end-to-end, loading state shown, error states handled, auto-refresh updates UI

sub_tasks.title: Polish and responsive design
sub_tasks.description: Final visual polish: consistent pastel palette, smooth animations, proper z-indexing. Mobile touch interactions (pinch zoom, swipe bottom sheet). Performance optimization: sprite batching, throttled re-renders. Favicon and meta tags. README with setup instructions.
sub_tasks.acceptance: Smooth 60fps on mobile, all interactions feel polished, build succeeds with no warnings
